title: LNE Rogues & Warriors Add-On
description: Loot & Explore Add-On with Rogues & Warriors (RPG-Series ) related Content, like new Structures, Weapons etc.
body:
## LNE x Rogues & Warriors (RPG-Series) Add-On💎🗡️
![Warrior Turret](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JEvQhsp7/images/1d50e3002db572e8b621f142a6864191cdc276e4.png)

[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archers-expansion)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu)
[![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee)
[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/LNE-Rogues-Add-On)

## 📂 Installation
### 🚨Required Mods
- [Rogues & Warriors](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors) (RPG-Series)
- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)

### 🤝Integrated Compatibility
- [Loot & Explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore) ( Additional Rogue & Warrior Weapons )


## 🕹️ Features
- Loot & Explore is only a optional Dependency, if you dont want the special Rogue & Warrior Weapons and just want the class related structures, you dont have to install the L&E Mod, or you can disable the equipment in the config.

### ⚔️Equipment
- Special Daggers, Sickles, Glaives & Double Axes can be crafted with new Smithing Template Upgrades (Only if Loot & Explore is installed)
- Each weapon has their own unique passive ability🪄
![Special Rogue & Warrior Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JEvQhsp7/images/8b4ec1e68f7c4b660aea4bc432ff894a705dc50c.png)

### 🏚️Structures
- Find new Rogues & Warrior related Structures while exploring!
- Loot the chests and get rewarded with equipment related to this rpg class
- You can rarely find Spell Books with bound spells in these structures
![Rogue Hideout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JEvQhsp7/images/2a45ffa134ace26805a6a31dcb028d4d1580aa61.png)

## 🎥Showcases



### 🧑‍🔧Roadmap
- More Rogue & Warrior related Structures
- 1.21.x Port 
- New Spells & Spell Books
- Rogue Themed Enemies
- New Spells/Spell Books for each class
- More Special Weapons

### 🙌Credits
- Deadelus - for creating the Rogues Mod and inspiring this Add-On
- [Emil](https://emil.art/) for creating the cute Mod Icon's

Feel free to use this Mod in your Modpack, Video etc. If you want to give feedback about the mod or report bugs, feel free to join my Discord Server! :)
